# MDE 1.3.7

## Features

- Refined the left explorer footer so Settings is now a dedicated icon button while the Theme control keeps the existing compact theme-selector style on the same row.
- Updated workspace recent-file ordering so reopening a file already in the latest seven recent files preserves the visible order, while files outside that range still move to the top.

## Bug Fixes

- Removed the duplicate right-edge border from the left explorer panel.
- Removed the duplicate separator above the expanded Recent Files panel so only the resize handle provides the visible divider.
- Preserved single dividers for collapsed explorer and collapsed Recent Files states after removing the duplicate expanded-state borders.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Updated focused unit coverage for recent-file ordering and split Settings/Theme explorer controls.
- Updated theme-related E2E flows to use the new Change theme control.
- Added runtime E2E checks for explorer footer alignment and duplicate border removal.
- Added integration coverage for explorer border rules across expanded and collapsed states.
- Could not inspect optional GitHub Actions signing/notarization secrets because the current GitHub token lacks repository secrets read permission. The release remains compatible with the existing unsigned macOS DMG/ZIP path and Windows NSIS updater artifacts.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "edits and auto-saves markdown, then creates a new file|selects and persists a manual theme from settings|selects the current system theme family"`

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon DMG and ZIP
- macOS Intel DMG and ZIP
- Windows x64 NSIS installer
